name: Drift Baseline And Monitoring Handoff

scope.mode: public unauthenticated HTTP snapshot plus E-3 rendered-browser reference
scope.privateContentPolicy: Do not store raw private route response bodies. Private boundary checks use status/policy only.

rawHtmlCommonFinding.title: Mitra Auto | Full-Service Garage in Helsinki - Tires, Maintenance & Repairs
rawHtmlCommonFinding.descriptionPrefix: Book your appointment online at Mitra Auto, a premium full-service garage in Helsinki.
rawHtmlCommonFinding.driftInterpretation: Current raw HTML is a weak baseline for search because route-specific head, links, schema, and primary content depend on client rendering.

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Permanent one-hop redirect to canonical www host.
Indexable 200, self-canonical, Finnish rendered content, crawlable navigation, Organization/LocalBusiness graph where implemented.
representativeUrls.sitemapPolicy: Include in sitemap after sitemap deployment is fixed.

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Indexable 200, English content and metadata, self-canonical, hreflang when locale clusters are implemented.
representativeUrls.sitemapPolicy: Include if intended as canonical English entry.

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Indexable 200, self-canonical, crawlable links to English service detail pages.
representativeUrls.sitemapPolicy: Include in service sitemap or root sitemap.

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Indexable 200, self-canonical, visible service content, booking CTA, LocalBusiness/service consistency.
Indexable 200, English rendered content, self-canonical, localized metadata.
Indexable 200 when populated, self-canonical, crawlable category/product links.
Indexable 200 when populated, English content, self-canonical, crawlable product links.
Indexable 200, self-canonical slug URL, visible price/stock/identifier, Product/Offer markup, feed URL agreement.
representativeUrls.sitemapPolicy: Include in product sitemap after XML deployment is fixed.

representativeUrls.targetPolicy: Permanent one-hop redirect to the human-readable product slug.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /catalog.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /en/services.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /en/services/tire-hotel.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /palvelut/autohuolto.
Permanent one-hop redirect to /palvelut/dpf-huolto.
Noindex utility route with correct URL, no sitemap inclusion, no product canonical pollution.
Noindex or authenticated/safe confirmation state; exclude from sitemap.
Authenticated route or safe 404/401/403, noindex, no sitemap inclusion.
Must not render unauthenticated private/admin content. Expected 401, 403, or safe 404.
Indexable 200 English contact page with self-canonical and visible NAP/contact facts.
Redirect to /en/contact if intended; otherwise return 404 or 410.
Return HTTP 404 or 410 with safe noindex not-found content.
Return 200 text/plain with sitemap declarations and no accidental global block.
Return 200 XML sitemap index or sitemap containing canonical indexable URLs only.
Return XML product sitemap or sitemap index, not HTML shell.
Return XML merchant feed matching product page price, availability, identifiers, and canonical URLs.

renderedReferenceFromE3.title: Car Service Helsinki | Maintenance and Garage | Mitra Auto

blockDeploymentOrRollback: Public /cms or private/admin route returns unauthenticated private content.
Homepage or important indexable template becomes non-200, blocked, noindex, or canonicalizes to another host.
robots.txt is missing, globally blocks production unintentionally, or omits expected sitemap declarations after sitemap release.
sitemap.xml, product sitemap, or merchant feed returns HTML, 404, redirect, or non-XML content after release.
Checkout, account, order, or CMS routes become indexable or enter sitemaps.
Product page price, availability, identifier, schema, feed, cart, or checkout values diverge.
criticalReviewRequired: Legacy product ID/SKU/UUID URL does not permanently redirect to the slug URL.
Invalid or removed route returns HTTP 200 soft-404.
Route-specific title, canonical, robots, language, schema, or primary H1 disappears in rendered browser output.
English and Finnish route language/canonical policies conflict.
Internal links point to legacy, redirecting, HTML-feed, soft-404, or private URLs at scale.
warningReview: Meta description loses page specificity while the route remains otherwise valid.
Optional schema recommended fields disappear without changing visible facts.
Response time materially increases on representative templates.
Accessibility landmarks, labels, or primary action markers regress on sampled browser tasks.

eachRelease: Run bounded HTTP matrix for representativeUrls.
Run rendered browser smoke for homepage, service detail, catalog/product, checkout start, booking start, contact, invalid route, and private boundary status.
Validate robots, sitemap, product sitemap, Merchant feed, legacy redirects, and product ID redirects.
Annotate release date, changed templates, static assets, redirects, provider deployments, and known exceptions.
weekly: Check public robots/sitemap/feed URLs and critical redirect samples.
Review Search Console manual actions, security issues, indexing anomalies, and sitemap errors when access is available.
Review Merchant Center and Business Profile diagnostics when access is available.
Review booking/order/checkout failure alerts and exposed-private-route checks.
monthly: Segment Search Console and analytics by page type, locale, device, query intent, product/service family, and qualified outcome.
Review content freshness, product/feed stock drift, local facts, Core Web Vitals field evidence, and conversion quality.
Refresh representative URL set when new page types, product lifecycle states, or public routes ship.
quarterly: Recheck schema feature status, AI/crawler policy, Merchant Center policy, GBP policy, and source documentation.
Review architecture/content portfolio, route exceptions, stale redirects, and experiment/monitoring decisions.

incidentTriggers.firstResponse: Disable route or require auth at edge/app layer, preserve sanitized evidence, rotate/clean exposed data if confirmed, verify unauthenticated 401/403/404.
Verify deployment target, asset routing, content type, cache state, Search Console sitemap status, and Merchant Center fetch state.

incidentTriggers.trigger: Organic traffic, indexed pages, product approvals, bookings, or orders materially drop
incidentTriggers.firstResponse: Diagnose in order: measurement, outage, access/index/canonical/rendering, platform messages, demand/SERP, content, competition.

limitations: Authenticated Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, Cloudflare, and server-log evidence was unavailable.
Sitemap membership cannot be verified while public sitemap URLs are missing or serving HTML.
Rendered browser evidence is linked from E-3 and was not rerun for E-4 to avoid storing private route artifacts.
This baseline improves regression detection; it does not guarantee crawling, indexing, rankings, traffic, conversions, or rich results.
